name: Catacomb
description: A minimalist Wolfenstein-style raycaster built from Canvas draw ops: a fixed-point DDA engine (no floats, no trig natives — a baked sine table) renders fog-shaded brick walls with running-bond texturing and two-leaf sliding doors that open as you approach. Billboarded guards patrol and chase, a pistol fires on tap, and a HUD tracks health, ammo and score. Move with the D-pad, aim and shoot by tapping the 3D view.
